stories.story: Define v3 schemas for session, tool, permission, hook, telemetry, and context handoff.
Build schema lint and contradiction checker for prompt constraints.
Implement v2-to-v3 compatibility diagnostics and migration hints.

definitionOfDone.item: Schemas pass positive and negative fixtures.
Lint catches missing required prompt fields and contradictory constraints.

stories.story: Implement client lifecycle state machine with restart and recovery policies.
Implement session lifecycle service with create, resume, send, abort, archive semantics.
Link session and pipeline traces with correlation IDs.

definitionOfDone.item: Recovery from controlled crash with trace continuity.
Session resume preserves active constraints and objective.

stories.story: Unify tool hook permission path through central policy engine.
Require schema validation before every tool invocation.
Record policy decision rationale and artifact links.

definitionOfDone.item: No tool execution without explicit policy decision artifact.
Denied decisions are machine-readable and replayable.

stories.story: Implement agent capability profiles and mode-aware execution templates.
Add signed skill manifest checks and deterministic precedence rules.
Build MCP connector manager with trust tiers and health policy.

definitionOfDone.item: Agent and MCP routing is deterministic and traceable.
Skill conflict resolution outputs reproducible decisions.

stories.story: Normalize all runtime events to a versioned telemetry envelope.
Adopt replay-first E2E harness and snapshot lifecycle.
Create stress suites for concurrency and failure injection.

definitionOfDone.item: Stress suite catches and blocks silent failure paths.

stories.story: Build migration runner with dry-run diff and remediation output.
Implement release gates for validation, security, context-integrity, and prompt-quality.
Publish docs and execution runbooks with validated examples.

definitionOfDone.item: Migration dry-run approved with zero unresolved critical blockers.
All release gates green before promotion.
